name: assembly
description: Assembly is a human-led product-building toolkit for an eventual agentic app factory, spanning contextual next steps, project status, product discovery, prototypes, engineering delivery, QA, review, and launch.

interface.shortDescription: Human-led workflows for lovable, viable, well-engineered apps.
interface.longDescription: Assembly is a dual-runtime product-building toolkit (Codex and Claude Code) for an eventual agentic app factory. It keeps the human in the founder/product-director seat while agents follow a deliberately small public skill surface: contextual next action, project status/scaffold/repair, product discovery, prototypes, specs, planning, implementation, tests, QA, review, simplification, and ship decisions. Detailed guidance lives in references so agents load only the context they need.
defaultPrompt: Use next to do the next normal thing.
Use project-status to scaffold this project.
Use project-status to tell me what phase we are in.
